entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM F. SP. CICERIS
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes wilt in chickpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The host crop affected by Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. ciceris

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region from which the fungal isolates were collected

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among the isolates of the pathogen

entities.name: AMPLIFIED FRAGMENT LENGTH POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: A molecular technique used to evaluate genetic variations and characterize isolates

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The ability of the fungal isolates to cause disease in the host

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity exhibited by the fungal isolates

entities.name: ECOR1 AND MSE1 PRIMER COMBINATIONS
entities.description: Specific primer sets used for selective amplification in AFLP analysis

entities.name: UPGMA CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A clustering method used to classify isolates based on genetic similarities

entities.name: PRINCIPLE COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A multivariate analysis method used to classify isolates into groups

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying the genetic makeup of the pathogen
